mingghan_allocations.title: Collect Incident Tickets
mingghan_allocations.description: Collect all Helpdesk tickets from Feb 28th related to the major production outage to identify initial reports and affected systems. (只读分析)

mingghan_allocations.title: Analyze Incident Timeline
mingghan_allocations.description: Analyze the collected Helpdesk tickets to establish a detailed timeline of the incident, including initial report, escalation, and resolution steps. (只读分析)

mingghan_allocations.title: List System Integrations Status
mingghan_allocations.description: List all third-party system integrations and their current operational status to understand the recovery situation. (只读分析)

mingghan_allocations.title: Investigate Critical Integrations
mingghan_allocations.description: Investigate detailed configuration and status of critical system integrations potentially affected by the outage. (只读分析)

mingghan_allocations.title: Collect Incident Emails
mingghan_allocations.description: Collect all emails received on Feb 28th that are related to the production outage to gather communication and initial technical details. (只读分析)

mingghan_allocations.title: Analyze Email Technical Details
mingghan_allocations.description: Analyze the collected incident-related emails for specific technical details, troubleshooting steps, and communication patterns during the outage. (只读分析)

mingghan_allocations.title: Search Knowledge Base for Similar Incidents
mingghan_allocations.description: Search the knowledge base for articles related to 'production outage', 'major incident', or specific error messages from the incident to identify historical precedents. (只读分析)

mingghan_allocations.title: Review Recent Meeting Records
mingghan_allocations.description: Review meeting records from the last 7 days for any discussions or decisions regarding recent system changes, deployments, or maintenance that might be related to the incident. (只读分析)

mingghan_allocations.title: List Scheduled Jobs Status
mingghan_allocations.description: List all active scheduled jobs, their status, and last execution times to check for any jobs that might have triggered or failed around the incident time. (只读分析)

mingghan_allocations.title: Investigate Scheduled Job History
mingghan_allocations.description: Investigate the execution history of scheduled jobs that ran immediately before or during the incident to identify potential triggers or contributing factors. (只读分析)
